name: integration_i_added_a_free_trial_and_my_paid_convers
method: I added a free trial and my paid conversion went from 2% to 11%. Here's the exact setup. when I launched my app I had a hard paywall. User would open it, saw what it could do, hit a screen asking you

phases.name: generate_trial_code
steps: create universal trial-gate.js (localStorage 7-day timer, graceful degradation)
create analytics ping for trial_start and trial_convert events

phases.name: inject_and_deploy
steps: inject trial gate into all hard_paywall apps
update landing pages with 'Start Free Trial' CTA replacing 'Buy Now'

phases.name: verify_and_track
steps: playwright test each updated app for trial flow
add conversion tracking to KPI dashboard
